articles.title: This Ethereum Rival Is the ‘Most Loved Altcoin’ by Institutional Investors This Year, According to CoinShares
articles.description: Digital assets manager CoinShares says that one top Ethereum (ETH) rival is being cherished over all other altcoins this year. articles.title: Crypto gambling site Stake sees suspicious withdrawals totalling $16M
articles.description: The withdrawals were flagged by Security firm Cyvers Alerts. The cryptocurrencies involved in the withdrawals include USDT, ETH, DAI, USDC and STAKE. Alphapo, a supplier of payment services to several crypto-gambling sites saw similar erroneous withdrawals on July 23. Security firm Cyvers Alerts has flagged withdrawals from the cryptocurrency gambling Slake platform totalling $16 million...

articles.title: Solana Is the ‘Most Loved Altcoin Among investors’, Says CoinShares
articles.description: Investors have been withdrawing from altcoin crypto funds, but Solana is an exception.

articles.title: XRP Will Replace US$ as World’s Reserve Currency: Ripple CTO
articles.description: In a recent Twitter Spaces titled “What’s Happening with XRP,” David “JoelKatz” Schwartz, the CTO of Ripple hypothesized a scenario wherein XRP could emerge as the world’s reserve currency. Speaking about world reserve currencies, Schwartz stated that he believed that a lot of the world was done with the American dollar as the reserve currency. […]

articles.title: Will Cardano (ADA) Price Hold or Fold at $0.25?
articles.description: The price of Cardano (ADA) is trading inside a crucial horizontal support area at $0.25. The area has been in place since the start of the year. Readings from the weekly and daily timeframes are mixed, making it difficult to determine the future trend’s direction until the price makes a decisive movement in one or the other direction. articles.description: Cardano is a prominent proof-of-stake blockchain supporting decentralized apps. Its native token, ADA, is trading at 91.7% below its all-time high. While new crypto investors can panic during a market downturn, experienced traders use them to buy coins they think will add value to their investments in the medium to long term. articles.title: Betting platform Stake sees over $41 million in suspicious crypto outflows
articles.description: Suspicious outflows on Stake reportedly amount to over $41 million across Ethereum, Polygon and BNB Chain.

articles.title: Colorado Now Accepts Crypto for Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration Renewals
articles.description: Colorado residents can now renew their driver’s licenses and vehicle registrations using cryptocurrency. The state’s Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) now accepts cryptocurrency through PayPal for online payments, according to a new press release. The DMV says it will charge a service fee of $1 plus 1.83% of the total transaction cost for paying with […]
